u with rightwards arrow on top equals 3 i with rightwards arrow on top minus 2 stack j space with rightwards arrow on top comma space v with rightwards arrow on top equals negative i with rightwards arrow on top space plus 4 i with rightwards arrow on top space d a n space r with rightwards arrow on top equals 7 i with rightwards arrow on top minus 8 j with rightwards arrow on top
J i k a space r with rightwards arrow on top equals m u with rightwards arrow on top plus n v with rightwards arrow on top
